subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Book speaketh forth, yet the people hear not; and the Pen warbleth, yet mankind perceiveth not; and the Tablet lamenteth inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب ینطق و القوم لا یسمعون و القلم یغرد و الناس لایعرفون و اللوح ینوح بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God and human limitations
